questionTypes.checkbox: Multiple choice from options - use 'options' array

_documentation.requiredFields: Each question needs: id (unique), type, label. Add 'required: true' for mandatory questions.

questions.label: How likely are you to join IEEE after attending SAC?
How aware are you now of IEEE Young Professionals (YP) Offerings?
How aware are you now of Women in Engineering Offerings?
How likely are you to attend another IEEE event in the next 6-12 months?
How likely are you to make professional connections at IEEE events?
What part of SAC was most valuable to you and why?
